  • Method
com.nexacro.java.xapi.data

Interface DataSetDataConverter

  • All Known Implementing Classes:
    DefaultDataSetDataConverter

    public interface DataSetDataConverter

    Transform

    DataSet data to other type data. DataSet use DataSetDataConverter to transform data, and basically applied DataSetDataConverter is DefaultDataSetDataConverter.

    데

    to change data transformation method, realize DataSetDataConverter, and summon DataSet setDataConverter(DataSetDataConverter) to apply user DataSetDataConverter.

    Next is the DataSet and relationship beween the internally summoned method, DataSetDataConverter. The caveat is, when setting DataSet data, if (isConvertingToDataType) of data type transtormation status is "false", summoning DataSet set(row, column, value) does not transform data but saves original data without transformation. i.e. DataSetDataConverter transformation method is not summoned.

    DataSet Method DataSetDataConverter Method
    getObject(int, int) or getObject(int, String) toObject(DataSet, int, int, Object, int, Object)
    getString(int, int) or getString(int, String) toString(DataSet, int, int, Object, int, String)
    getInt(int, int) or getInt(int, String) toInt(DataSet, int, int, Object)
    getBoolean(int, int) or getBoolean(int, String) toBoolean(DataSet, int, int, Object)
    getLong(int, int) or getLong(int, String) toLong(DataSet, int, int, Object)
    getFloat(int, int) or getFloat(int, String) toFloat(DataSet, int, int, Object)
    getDouble(int, int) or getDouble(int, String) toDouble(DataSet, int, int, Object)
    getBigDecimal(int, int) or getBigDecimal(int, String) toBigDecimal(DataSet, int, int, Object)
    getDateTime(int, int) or getDateTime(int, String) toDateTime(DataSet, int, int, Object)
    getBlob(int, int) or getBlob(int, String) toBlob(DataSet, int, int, Object, String)
    set(int, int, Object) or set(int, String, Object) convert(DataSet, int, int, Object, int, String)
    set(int, int, String) or set(int, String, String) convert(DataSet, int, int, String, int, String)
    set(int, int, int) or set(int, String, int) convert(DataSet, int, int, int, int)
    set(int, int, boolean) or set(int, String, boolean) convert(DataSet, int, int, boolean, int)
    set(int, int, long) or set(int, String, long) convert(DataSet, int, int, long, int)
    set(int, int, float) or set(int, String, float) convert(DataSet, int, int, float, int)
    set(int, int, double) or set(int, String, double) convert(DataSet, int, int, double, int)
    set(int, int, BigDecimal) or set(int, String, BigDecimal) convert(DataSet, int, int, BigDecimal, int)
    set(int, int, Date) or set(int, String, Date) convert(DataSet, int, int, Date, int)
    set(int, int, byte[]) or set(int, String, byte[]) convert(DataSet, int, int, byte[], int, String)
    Author:
    Choi, Jongkwan

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      static int HEADER_ROW
      Indicates ColumnHeader. i.e. if row value of the HEADER_ROW factor delivered, it transforms ColumnHeader constant value.

    • Field Detail

      • HEADER_ROW

        static final int HEADER_ROW
        Indicates ColumnHeader. i.e. if row value of the HEADER_ROW factor delivered, it transforms ColumnHeader constant value.
